results.title: 5 ways AI and data are changing healthcare forever
results.description: AI in precision medicine market is driving smarter healthcare with AI-powered triage, predictive care, autonomous workflows, and personalized patient experiences.

results.title: Data centre battles marking politics worldwide
results.description: Governments worldwide are pushing to attract AI computing infrastructure, but must grapple with data centres' demands on resources and mounting local opposition

results.title: Petrol consumers pay more as govt. claws back fuel subsidy
results.description: Fuel prices remained unchanged in the latest revision, but it's not all good news for petrol vehicle owners. Find out why petrol consumers are now bearing the brunt of the government's Nu 1.824 billion fuel price support recovery.
